entities.boy: a boy in a flannel shirt
entities.pot: a cast-iron pot over the fire

scenes.title: The Campfire Cooking
scenes.background_prompt: A forest clearing with a campfire surrounded by stones, a log to sit on, pine trees, and a starry sky beginning to appear. Evening. No people, no cooking equipment.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A forest clearing in the early evening as the first stars appear. A boy of about twelve in a red flannel shirt and hiking boots sits on a thick log beside a crackling campfire ringed with flat stones. Over the fire, a black cast-iron pot hangs from a metal tripod, its contents bubbling and sending thick plumes of steam into the cool evening air. The boy holds a long wooden spoon, stirring the pot carefully. Pine trees with dark green needles surround the clearing, their trunks lit orange by the firelight. A rolled-up sleeping bag and a small backpack lean against the log. The sky above transitions from deep blue to purple, with a few bright stars visible through gaps in the canopy.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place boy on the log beside the campfire, sitting and holding a long wooden spoon. Place pot hanging from a metal tripod over the fire, contents bubbling with thick steam rising.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom left foreground of this children's picture-book scene, clusters of small yellow and blue five-petaled flowers grow in tall green grass, interspersed with green four-leaf clovers and small white three-petaled flowers that continue across the bottom edge to the right. On the far left, two large, stylized green evergreen trees with brown trunks stand in front of a dense forest of green trees. In the center middle ground, a campfire is contained within a circle of grey, rounded stones, with bright orange and yellow flames rising upward. A tripod made of three thin grey poles stands over the fire, supporting a silver pot by its handle. The lid of the pot is slightly ajar, revealing bubbling orange stew inside, while two wisps of white steam curl into the air. To the right of the campfire, a boy with short brown hair and a smiling face sits on a horizontal brown log. He wears a tan and brown plaid shirt over a white undershirt, blue pants, and brown boots. He sits facing left, holding a large, light-brown wooden spoon with both hands. Behind the boy and the log are more green deciduous and evergreen trees. The background consists of a thick forest of green trees under a twilight sky that transitions from pale yellow and orange at the horizon to a deep blue at the top. Several white, fluffy clouds are scattered across the sky, along with several small, four-pointed white and yellow stars.
